svg.text: IBroker + IDataProvider interfaces · Dependency Inversion · Current: Zerodha Kite · Future: Angel, Dhan, Fyers, Groww, Upstox
All methods are async · Return domain models · No broker-specific types leaked
Returns standardized domain types · Exchange-agnostic field names
Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff · Max 3000 instruments
Access token: daily, encrypted at rest (AES-256)
Rate limit: 3 req/sec enforced by throttle decorator
Does NOT inherit KiteConnect — composition only
Hybrid: WS per-strike LTP + REST full chain 60s
iv/greeks: computed via Black-Scholes (not from Kite)
OI / volume: from tick stream via Redis cache
NSEProvider caches at Redis · TTL 60s · No auth required
Binary frame decode: struct.unpack_from() for Kite packet format
Prices stored as Decimal (not float) to avoid rounding errors
FUTURE IMPLEMENTATIONS (Phase 3+ — grayed out, not yet built)
to add a new broker adapter
No live orders in unit tests
Architectural Guarantee: Zero Broker-Specific Symbols in Domain Layer

Domain only sees IBroker, IDataProvider, IWebSocketManager interfaces · All Kite-specific types (kiteconnect.Order etc.) are confined to the Infrastructure adapter · BrokerOrder, BrokerPosition, MarginResponse are domain value objects
Access token encrypted at rest using app-level AES-256; key stored outside database in environment/vault · Never logged, never returned via API
